thesis: The familiar object is best understood not as a product, but as the endpoint of a hidden system.
viewer_promise: By the end, the viewer will see the ordinary object as a map of the system that produced it.

chapters.title: The Object in Plain Sight
chapters.function: Open the question and reveal the hidden chain.

spans.text: It looks like a single object. In reality, it is the final visible step in a chain that may cross industries, borders, and years.
spans.visual_intent: Begin on a close detail, then reveal a map-like chain.
